items.name: Moebius
items.text:
Moebius-inspired illustration.
Clean, precise linework.
Surreal science-fantasy world.
Airy minimalist composition.
Soft, open environments.
Dreamlike sci-fi landscapes.
Elegant ink drawing style.
Subtle color accents.
French comics illustration aesthetic.
Strange but calm visual storytelling.
Architectural surrealism.
Lightweight, flowing line design.
Conceptual science fantasy art.
1960s–1980s European comics style.

items.text:
Alex Ross-inspired painted realism
photorealistic comic book painting
iconic superhero illustration
mythic portrait composition
classical dramatic lighting
museum-quality figurative realism
staged cinematic hero imagery
idealized anatomy with realistic rendering
painted photograph aesthetic
bold iconic framing.

items.name: Corben, Richard
items.text:
Richard Corben-inspired fantasy illustration.
Heavy Metal magazine aesthetic.
Underground fantasy comics style.
Exaggerated anatomy.
Highly rendered figures.
Grotesque fantasy realism.
Strange dreamlike atmosphere.
Dark fantasy storytelling.
Expressive faces and forms.
Muscular stylized physiques.
Strong shadows and dramatic lighting.
Comic illustration realism.
Weird fantasy adventure.
Surreal horror undertones.
Painterly comic-book realism.

items.name: Ditko, Steve
items.text:
Steve Ditko-inspired classic comic illustration.
Angular stylized anatomy.
Clean sharp ink linework.
Strong geometric form construction.
Dynamic perspective and foreshortening.
Clear separation of shapes and silhouettes.
Minimal shading with functional line hatching.
1960s Marvel Silver Age comic style.
Graphic clarity over realism.
Energetic composition with exaggerated posture.
Flat but expressive rendering.
Emphasis on structure and gesture.
Not painterly.
Not soft shaded.
items.author: Unknown

items.name: Romita Jr, John
items.text:
John Romita Jr.-inspired comic illustration.
Blocky stylized anatomy construction.
Heavy structural linework.
Angular facial features.
Simplified but powerful figure design.
Strong gesture-based posing.
Bold ink outlines.
High readability superhero composition.
Marvel-style action storytelling.
Solid geometric anatomy forms.
Rough textured ink aesthetic.
Stylized realism with heavy structure.
Not delicate or painterly.
